scripts.mcp:preflight: npm run mcp:check:versions && npm run build:npm -w @ada-mcp/mcp-server && npm run test:verify:mcp-plugins && npm run test:mcp:bundled
scripts.mcp:pack:dry-run: npm run mcp:check:versions && npm --prefix apps/ada-mcp-server run pack:dry-run
scripts.test:unit: tsx test/log-locale.test.ts && tsx test/download-probe-persist.test.ts && tsx test/install-progress.test.ts && tsx test/require-real-classify.test.ts && tsx test/runtime-probe.test.ts && tsx test/install-summary.test.ts && tsx test/playwright-browsers-discovery.test.ts && tsx test/tools-paths.test.ts && tsx test/android-uia2-probe.test.ts && tsx test/mobile-session-signature.test.ts && tsx test/session-key.test.ts && tsx test/ui-dump-cache.test.ts && tsx test/smart-wait.test.ts && tsx test/cdp-auto-launch.test.ts && tsx test/command-timeout.test.ts && tsx test/playwright-defaults.test.ts && tsx test/playwright-locator.test.ts && tsx test/mobile-ui.test.ts && tsx test/device-scan.test.ts && tsx test/device-params-guide.test.ts && tsx test/mobile-gestures.test.ts && tsx test/harmony-pinch.test.ts && tsx test/mobile-device-admin.test.ts && tsx test/fill-search.test.ts && tsx test/optional-ui.test.ts && tsx test/mobile-kill-all-apps.test.ts && tsx test/ios-kill-all-apps.test.ts && tsx test/ios-idevice-bootstrap.test.ts && tsx test/ios-locator.test.ts && tsx test/ios-hierarchy.test.ts && tsx test/ios-tap-at.test.ts && tsx test/ios-pick-locator.test.ts && tsx test/ios-afc-client.test.ts
scripts.test:mcp:unit: tsx test/driver-rpc-import.test.ts && tsx test/normalize-command.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-normalize.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-result.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-tool-catalog.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-p0-p1.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-platform-p0-p1.test.ts && tsx test/mcp-perf-cache.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcp:unit && npm run test:conformance
scripts.contracts:compat: npm run contracts:schema && npm run --workspace @ada/contracts schema:compat
